facebook.caption: POV: you stop scrolling Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and walk into Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant. Cold drink in hand. Sun dropping fast. 2,170 reviews told you it was worth it. They were right. $15-30 per person for drinks and food with that view. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Sun hits the water. Drink hits the table. Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo delivers exactly what the name promises. 4.3 stars. 2,170 people agree.

instagram.caption: POV: you found the sunset bar everyone keeps going back to. Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant. 4.3★, 2,170 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Drink in hand. Sun going down. Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant does not miss. $15-30 per person.

tiktok.caption: POV: you picked the right bar for sunset in Phu Quoc. 4.3★ and 2,170 reviews later. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocSunset #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel
